title: West Bengal elections: Calcutta High Court stays ECI's 'troublemakers’ list
description: The Calcutta High Court on Wednesday stayed an order issued by electoral authorities in West Bengal that directed action against alleged “troublemakers” ahead of the upcoming Assembly elections [Md Danish Farooqui v. Election Commission of India & Ors].The order was reportedly issued on the instructions of the Election Commission of India (ECI).
